title: senecio pyrenophilus
intro: Senecio pyrenophilus, also known as Pyrenean ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Senecio pyrenophilus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to address digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
